criteria_results.criterion: When a tool has 0 linked steps, the Step Usage section shows a muted hint message instead of being empty
criteria_results.evidence: Paragraph element found in Step Usage section with text 'No steps linked yet. Open a step on the canvas and assign this tool.' after creating a new tool with no linked steps.

criteria_results.criterion: Hint text: 'No steps linked yet. Open a step on the canvas and assign this tool.' (or similar)
criteria_results.evidence: Exact text confirmed: 'No steps linked yet. Open a step on the canvas and assign this tool.'

criteria_results.criterion: Hint uses text-white/30 or text-white/55 styling consistent with other empty states in the codebase
criteria_results.evidence: Element className='text-[12px] text-white/30 italic', computed color=oklab(0.999994 ... / 0.3), fontStyle=italic. Matches text-white/30 requirement.

criteria_results.criterion: When steps ARE linked, the existing clickable step list renders as before (no regression)
criteria_results.evidence: Build diff shows only 1 line changed (replacing old empty-state text with new). Static analysis confirms existing step list render path unchanged. No regression path touched.

criteria_results.criterion: When AI suggestions have been previously generated, a 'Last generated X ago' or timestamp label appears near the AI Suggestions button
criteria_results.evidence: Set localStorage key 'stride:ai-suggestions:c8f6619d-bdd8-4134-b7aa-3a70bcf599ea:generated-at' to 2h ago, reloaded page. Label 'Last generated 2h ago' appeared as a span (ref=e108) to the left of the AI Suggestions button. className='text-[11px] text-white/30'.

criteria_results.criterion: When no suggestions have been generated yet, no label is shown
criteria_results.evidence: On initial page load with no localStorage value, the AI Suggestions button parent container showed only 'AI Suggestions' text with no sibling label element.

criteria_results.criterion: Label uses muted text styling (text-white/30 or text-white/55)
criteria_results.evidence: Label element className='text-[11px] text-white/30', computed color=oklab(0.999994 ... / 0.3).

criteria_results.criterion: Existing AI Suggestions button functionality unchanged
criteria_results.evidence: Button ref=e109 with text 'AI Suggestions' present and clickable. Build diff confirms button markup unchanged; only a label span and state management were added.

criteria_results.criterion: When no maturity data exists, a single consolidated hint message appears instead of two separate messages
criteria_results.evidence: Page shows one paragraph: 'Open the canvas to set maturity scores on steps to enable gap analysis and AI narrative →'. The two original separate messages are gone. Second paragraph ('Set both current and target maturity on steps to see gap analysis') belongs to the table empty state — a different section.

criteria_results.criterion: The consolidated message includes a link to the canvas (preserving the existing navigation)
criteria_results.evidence: Link href='/w/c8f6619d-bdd8-4134-b7aa-3a70bcf599ea/fcfdce67-1453-46c9-a8f2-c3c0ef615619' (workflow canvas tab). Link text: 'Open the canvas to set maturity scores on steps'.

criteria_results.criterion: When maturity data exists, the gap analysis table and AI narrative render normally (no regression)
criteria_results.evidence: Build diff shows the change is inside a conditional block (hasGapData=false branch). The hasGapData=true path and generate-summary text are explicitly noted as unchanged in BUILD_RESULT_3.json notes.

criteria_results.criterion: Text styling consistent with existing gap analysis page
criteria_results.evidence: Link color=rgb(59, 130, 246) which is --accent-blue (#3B82F6) from the design system. Consistent with existing link patterns.

bugs_found.description: Hydration mismatch on Improvements page when localStorage contains a 'last generated' timestamp. React reports server rendered HTML (no label) doesn't match client (span label). Root cause: lastGeneratedAt state is initialized using a typeof window check or similar pattern that causes the client's first render to differ from the server's. React recovers by re-generating the tree client-side, so the page functions correctly, but the error appears in console and causes a flash.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Set localStorage key 'stride:ai-suggestions:[workspaceId]:generated-at' to any ISO timestamp. 2. Navigate to /w/[workspaceId]/improvements. 3. Observe console error: 'Hydration failed because the server rendered HTML didn't match the client... <span className="text-[11px] text-white/30"> vs <button ...>'.

improvements_found.observation: The 'Last generated X ago' label has no tooltip showing the exact datetime. For timestamps like '2h ago', users cannot determine if it was generated today or yesterday without a precise timestamp on hover.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add a title attribute or Tooltip component to the label showing the full ISO datetime formatted in user locale.
